text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So that's the end of summer camp... I guess it
went all right.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The end of summer means autumn is just around
the corner. And you know what that means...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yep, exactly. And I've got a score to settle...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There's still time before the big race. We should
go back through everything we've done so far,
cover to cover.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'll ever let her take first place!
